member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This consturctor allows to specify a root project settings source, which will from which the root project settings should be fetched instead of the default source.
member.param: Project settings source, which should act as root.

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.SettingsController.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.Interface.IProjectSettingsSource})
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This constructor allows to specify additional project setting sources, which will be merged into the default root project settings.
member.param: Additional project setting sources, which should be merged in to the default project settings.

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.SettingsController.#ctor(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.Interface.IProjectSettingsSource,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.Interface.IProjectSettingsSource})
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This consturctor allows to specify a root project settings source, which will from which the root project settings should be fetched instead of the default source. Further it allows to specify additional project setting sources, which will be merged into the default root project settings.
member.param: Project settings source, which should act as root.
Additional project setting sources, which should be merged in to the default project settings.

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.SettingsController.#ctor(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.Interface.IProjectSettingsSource,Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.Interface.IProjectSettingsSource[])
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This consturctor allows to specify a root project settings source, which will from which the root project settings should be fetched instead of the default source. Further it allows to specify additional project setting sources, which will be merged into the default root project settings.
member.param: Project settings source, which should act as root. By specifying null here, the default source is used.
Additional project setting sources, which should be merged in to the default project settings.

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.Merge(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings,Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings)
member.summary:
Merges two XmlProjectSettings objects into a new one.
In the first step the method merges the setting items entries. Here the original setting items have precedence over the additional setting items, i.e. if a setting item with the same id exists in both sets, the original one is taken.
In the second step the method merges the setting hierarchies. The hierarchy merge functionality allows to attach external categories into existing ones, by simply using an id of an existing category as the root category reference. Subitems and subcategories are merged recursively, which allows to append new settings or categories into existing ones.
member.remarks: ATTENTION: This method also alters the elements contained in 'originalSettings', which means, that they are not in their original state after executing this method.
member.returns: Merged xml project settings.
member.author: ADBRCH22

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.MergeSettingsHierarchies(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlCategoryRef[],Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlCategoryRef[])
member.summary: Merges two
member.returns: Merged settings hierarchy.
member.author: ADBRCH22

member.summary: Flattens the whole hierarchy of multiple category refs.

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.MergeCategoryRefs(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlCategoryRef,Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlCategoryRef)
member.summary:
Merges two category references.
The merge is performed recursively, i.e. matching sub category refs are merged into each other again.
member.param: Other category ref, which should be merged into the existing one.
member.returns: Merged category ref.
member.author: ADBRCH22

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.MergeSubSettings(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlSettingRef,Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlSettingRef)
member.summary:
Merges the sub settings of two setting refs.
The merge is performed recursively, i.e. matching sub setting refs are merged into each other again.
member.param: Other setting ref, whose sub settings should be merged into the original settings.
member.returns: Merged setting ref.
member.author: ADBRCH22

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.MergeSets``2(``0[],``0[],System.Func{``0,``1},System.Boolean,System.Func{``0,``0,``0})
member.summary:
Generic function for merging two sets by an id.
The elements of the additional set overwrite elements from the original set, if the element key matches.
member.typeparam: Type of the element in the sets.
Type of the key identifying each element in the sets.
member.param: Additional set, which should be merged into the original set.
Key function returning a key, which identifies an element in the set.
Determines, whether elements in the original set should be overwritten by elements in the additional set when the id matches.
Merge function to be used, when two elements should be merged.
member.returns: Merged set according to the specified key.
member.author: ADBRCH22

member.name: M:Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlProjectSettings.MergeCategories(Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlSettingCategory[],Comos.Platform.ProjectSettings.XML.XmlSettingCategory[])
member.summary:
Merges two category sets by category id.
Original set wins, if an id exists in both sets.

member.author: ADBRCH22
